tracks.meaning: The pointed end or extremity of a body part, especially the end of a finger or toe
The act of tilting or inclining something to one side
A gratuity or money given to a service worker as a reward for good service
A piece of useful advice or helpful information given to someone
In darts or similar games, the pointed part of a projectile that makes contact with the target
A pointed landform or promontory extending into water
Information or a prediction about the likely outcome of a race, match, or other event
A small piece of information or a clue that helps solve a problem
The pointed metal or plastic ferrule on the end of a pencil, brush handle, or similar object
The act of causing something to lean or overturn by applying force to one side
